name: VW-Tiger Catapult
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＶＷ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴィダブル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－タイガー・カタパルト
desc:
"V-Tiger Jet" + "W-Wing Catapult"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. You can discard 1 card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; change that target's battle position. (Flip effects are not activated.)

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duel Academy Box

mst: Prevents activation of Flip monsters' effects
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
